title: cymbopogon finitimus
intro: Cymbopogon finitimus, also known as East Indian lemongrass or simply lemongrass, is a type of grass native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Cymbopogon finitimus include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and providing relief from digestive issues. Cymbopogon finitimus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, essential oil, and extracts, which can be used for medicinal and therapeutic purposes.
